title: Non-genetically-based intraspecific differentiation for heavy metal tolerance in the copper moss Scopelophila cataractae
author: Boquete MT
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We used next-generation sequencing to study DNA methylation and gene expression changes in plants from four clonal populations of the metallophyte moss  Scopelophila cataractae  experimentally exposed to either Cd or Cu. For this we performed reduced representation bisulfite DNA sequencing and RNA sequencing.
steps_raw: We used next-generation sequencing to study DNA methylation and gene expression changes in plants from four clonal populations of the metallophyte moss  Scopelophila cataractae  experimentally exposed to either Cd or Cu. For this we performed reduced representation bisulfite DNA sequencing and RNA sequencing.
